definition: A data privacy right that allows individuals to request the deletion of their personal data held by an organization, also known as the right to be forgotten.
extendedDefinition: A data privacy right that allows individuals to request the deletion of their personal data held by an organization, also known as the right to be forgotten.
description: Right to Erasure. A data privacy right that allows individuals to request the deletion of their personal data held by an organization, also known as the right to be forgotten.
